Name: Denver TRACON Scoping Meeting - Virtual Session 1
nepa_notes__c: Scoping session covering northern Denver metro communities including Commerce City and Northglenn. Presenter: FAA Environmental Division.

Name: Denver TRACON Scoping Meeting - Virtual Session 2
nepa_notes__c: Scoping session covering southern Denver metro communities including Aurora and Englewood.

Name: Denver TRACON Draft EIS Public Hearing - Aurora
nepa_location__c: Aurora Municipal Center - City Council Chambers - 15151 E. Alameda Pkwy Aurora CO 80012
nepa_notes__c: In-person public hearing on Draft EIS. 89 oral comments recorded. Simultaneous Spanish-language interpretation provided. Sign-in sheets and written comment forms available. FAA stenographer present; full transcript available in administrative record.

Name: Denver TRACON Draft EIS Public Hearing - Denver
nepa_location__c: Denver City and County Building - Council Chambers - 1437 Bannock St Denver CO 80202
nepa_notes__c: In-person public hearing on Draft EIS. 62 oral comments recorded. Full transcript available in administrative record.

Name: Denver TRACON Community Coordination Meeting - Adams County
nepa_location__c: Adams County Government Center - 4430 S Adams County Pkwy Brighton CO 80601
nepa_notes__c: Interagency coordination meeting with Adams County commissioners and planning staff to review preliminary FEIS noise contour revisions and discuss ROD mitigation commitments. Not a public meeting; summary included in administrative record.
